changelog:
Consolidate Anthropic compatibility on the single standard /v1/messages endpoint. Remove /cc/v1/messages and legacy Claude path aliases, along with their Web UI entry. Standard Claude requests now cover chat, thinking, Claude Code, and agent tool streams with the same configurable pre-commit validation and live-streaming behavior.
Anthropic 兼容接口统一为标准 /v1/messages。移除 /cc/v1/messages、旧 Claude 路径别名及对应 Web 展示；普通聊天、Thinking、Claude Code 和 Agent 工具流现在统一使用同一端点，并共享可配置的提交前校验与实时流式逻辑。
